data_description.sensor_entity_id: Select the sensor entity that reports the last matched fingerprint slot. Leave blank if you use events instead.
data_description.event_type: The HA event type fired by ESPHome on every scan (default: esphome.fingerprint_scan).
data_description.esphome_device: The ESPHome device service prefix used for enrollment, e.g. 'fingerprint_reader' for service esphome.fingerprint_reader_fingerprint_enroll.

error.entity_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found. Make sure the ESPHome device is online.
